stemHtml: An aircraft demonstrates positive static directional stability. How does this relate to the interaction between the aircraft’s yawing moment coefficient, CN, and sideslip angle, B (beta)?

options.a: CN is positive and the aircraft experiences a negative sideslip angle.
options.b: CN=0 and the aircraft experiences a negative sideslip angle.
options.c: CN is positive and the aircraft experiences a positive sideslip angle.
options.d: C<sub>N</sub> is negative and the aircraft experiences a positive sideslip angle.
